hook.text: This Tom Hanks ad is fake. He's already said so. Here's the tell.

body.text: Mouth shapes don't match the words.
Skin texture stays frozen between blinks.
Audio sibilance is too clean for a phone capture.
Hanks publicly disavowed AI ads of himself in 2023.

cta.text: Scan before you trust. 5 free scans, no account needed.
